{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191353B11A0A8B06ABF5301002"}"},"total":65},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7335824914220172094","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"老书虫，但这本感觉还不错。剧情方面没有太大的逻辑漏洞，文笔也还好。只是作者是不擅长转场吗？很多转场没有描写直接下一幕戏了，印象比较深的是李元杼杀给他下罂粟香的太监那一段，没有转场，还有一个是玉儿回忆过往补充剧情那一段。没有转场就像一句话不带标点符号，两个字：难受。（可以先试试切换到下一幕戏时不要用角色的对话开启，用神态、环境描写铺垫一下）
人设方面，玉儿有时候有一些ooc，而且人设比较模糊，但是九皇子的人设挺鲜明的
总之，还行，问题不大。结合新人作者，还没更完，先给个五星","text_exts":[{"e":202,"s":199,"text":"九皇子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178033F5301002%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227335824914220172094%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227307550666749135934%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708006635,"group_id":"7307550666749135934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1osSgVNppbgdz80dsOa50hNTjoNWsh2MC/c4Jn82DC0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fe2a8bc38f904c099973bacdda9066c8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709757&x-signature=sKc0eclHa3wAYPrCO4FZ7tiN%2Fik%3D","user_id":"1297847153075339","user_name":"真武道的中文"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1297847153075339","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307550666749135934","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+古言】
全文已完结，敬请食用。
【白莲花式野心勃勃庶子】+【心冷面软心狠手狠佞臣】
【面幼腹黑疯批皇子】+【手段霹雳武德充沛暴君】

（受视角）身世复杂美强惨，从不受宠的庶子，一路科举中状元，并扶持非嫡非长还是断袖的九皇子，逆袭成为权势滔天佞臣。（其实也没有这么热血。）

九皇子李元杼:玉儿，你眼里怎么没有我呀。
裴衿:我心里有你，陛下。

（攻视角）这是爹不疼又没娘，脾气不好的皇子对一个长相艳丽的美人一见钟情，死缠烂打追到手的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o48f956fed49f11925cd53b422f72ce74~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白青灯","author_id":"","book_id":"7307550666749135934","book_name":"裴家庶子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1360人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7307624112627647038","read_count":"1360","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"500696"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"244","tags":"双男主,古代,腹黑,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o48f956fed49f11925cd53b422f72ce74~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362033&x-signature=E6dEEVorK%2B6Ub91irUNZC2gpX9c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1966371891585246","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"117"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191353B11A0A8B06ABF5301002"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4332,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23385,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5059},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type": }},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449773482666083134","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一半来评价一下，文笔已经很好了，叙事清楚，故事情节也比较紧凑，有待提高改进的地方一是感情发展，九皇子可以是见色起意，也不能单单是见色起意，你得写他是怎么爱上小裴的，要不然整的跟个流氓似的，小裴的人物性格刻画的不太够，他跟任何人都保持距离，很刚，唯独九皇子一掳就走，你总得有点刻画吧，这种偏爱，这种双标，总得写出来点原因。
其实写文把故事讲清楚已经成功了一大半，人物刻画和感情处理上再好一点我觉得会更精彩。
我看了六十几章，如果结尾进步了我会再来写评价。","text_exts":[{"e":52,"s":49,"text":"九皇子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178033F5301002%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227449773482666083134%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227307550666749135934%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734546796,"group_id":"7307550666749135934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjTMuSZ1c2uxkxttfTT5MnzzbmYceO2J3MJKkfQMWAA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3580486238873527","user_name":"小鬼329"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3580486238873527","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307550666749135934","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+古言】
